title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
